judgment.summary: Apple demonstrates robust growth and exceptional profitability supported by massive free cash flow generation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.01 beat the 1.94 estimate, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Earnings growth of 21.8% YoY shows strong bottom-line momentum.
Return on equity of 141.5% indicates exceptional capital efficiency.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $101.09B provides massive liquidity.
Profit margin of 27.2% reflects high-quality operational profitability.
negatives: Price/Book of 41.17 indicates a very high valuation relative to book value.
PEG ratio of 2.58 suggests the stock is priced at a premium to its growth.
Quick ratio of 0.91 suggests tight short-term liquidity.

news.paragraph: Apple is seeing positive momentum as the stock gains amid reports that the company is exploring AI agent integration within its App Store. While institutional interest and analyst price target resets provide a supportive backdrop, traders should also weigh broader macro risks related to US-China trade tensions.
headlines: Veteran analyst resets Apple stock price target for 2026
